stemHtml: What is the requirement for elevated runway lights?

options.a: All elevated lights, including those on the stopway, must be frangible and positioned to avoid obstructing aircraft engines and propellers.
options.b: They must be frangible with engine and propeller clearance, but stopway lights must be flush.
options.c: They must be rigid to withstand engine blast and propeller wash.
options.d: Rigid lighting is required only on taxiways and stopways to prevent displacement.
